about.title: Creating Lasting Tributes
about.paragraph1: For over three decades, Forever In Your Memory has been serving families with compassion and dedication. We understand that selecting a memorial is one of the most important decisions you'll make in honoring a loved one.
about.paragraph2: Our experienced team works closely with you to create personalized monuments that reflect the unique life and legacy of those you cherish. From traditional headstones to custom designs, we ensure every detail meets your vision.
about.imageAlt: Custom memorial monument with portrait engravings

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We offer a comprehensive range of memorial products and services to honor your loved ones

customMonuments.title: Custom Monuments
customMonuments.description: Personalized granite and marble monuments designed to your specifications, from traditional upright headstones to flat markers and more.

memorialPortraits.title: Memorial Portraits
memorialPortraits.description: High-quality ceramic photo medallions that preserve cherished memories with lasting durability for outdoor installation.

engraving.title: Engraving & Design
engraving.description: Expert engraving services including inscriptions, artwork, religious symbols, and custom designs to personalize your memorial.

cemeteryServices.title: Cemetery Services
cemeteryServices.description: Installation coordination and cemetery plot services to ensure proper placement and compliance with cemetery regulations.

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.description: Compassionate guidance through the selection process, helping you choose the perfect memorial within your budget.

cta.title: Let Us Help You Honor Your Loved One
cta.subtitle: Our caring team is here to guide you through every step of creating a beautiful and lasting memorial.

footer.tagline: Serving families with compassion and dedication
footer.copyright: Forever In Your Memory. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: We're here to help you honor your loved one

gallery.title: Our Work
gallery.subtitle: Browse our gallery of custom monuments and memorials. Each piece is crafted with care and precision to honor your loved ones.
